mapper.select: SELECT id, idempotency_key, request_hash, biz_type, biz_id, response_body, status, expire_at, created_at, updated_at FROM idempotency_record WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO idempotency_record (idempotency_key, request_hash, biz_type, biz_id, status, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{idempotencyKey}, #{requestHash}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{status}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW())
